opinion.h: Ted ENGLE, Superintendent, Chillicothe Correctional Institute, petitioner, v. Lincoln ISAAC;
E. P. PERINI, Superintendent, Marion Correctional Institution, petitioner, v. Kenneth L. BELL;
Ted ENGLE, Superintendent, Chillicothe Correctional Institute, petitioner, v. Howard HUGHES No. 80-1430
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The petition of Kenneth L. Bell for rehearing is denied.[ Engle v. Isaac 457 U.S. 1141 (1982) ]
